title: season — product analytics

events.name: Season Created
events.description: New Season row created. days_span = end_date - start_date; feeds tier-usage analytics on typical season lengths.

events.name: Season Current Changed
events.description: The current-flag flipped. Audit-critical + feeds the reporting-integrity dashboard — YoY reports pivot on this event.

events.name: Season Registration Opened
events.description: trigger: automated_phase_roll / manual_admin. days_before_start = start_date - opened_at (how far ahead the registration opens; negative if opened after start).

events.name: Season Registration Closed
events.description: enrolled_count_snapshot is aggregate (not PII) — count of active enrollments at close time.

events.name: Season Archived
events.description: had_active_enrollments = true when the caller passed --force (bypassed the FK check).

events.name: Season Dates Shifted
events.description: days_delta_* is the signed delta from the previous date. Feeds an audit-worthy signal — frequent shifts are a red flag.

events.name: Season Sport Key Changed
events.description: sport_key ITSELF is NEVER an analytics property — it's opaque tenant-scoped taxonomy. Just the fact of the change is tracked.

events.name: Season Quota Exceeded
events.description: Attempt to create a Season beyond the season_slot per-calendar-year cap. Feeds the upsell funnel — Medium-tier tenants hitting the 4-per-year cap are prime Enterprise upgrade candidates.

events.name: Season Registration Cap Reached
events.description: Enrolled count crossed capacity_target for the first time on this Season. Informational — enrollments continue past this signal.

events.name: Current Season Cache Miss
events.description: scope_tuple_specificity: exact (4/4) / partial (2-3/4) / tenant_only (1/4). Feeds cache-warming decisions on the /seasons/current hot path.

notes: sport_key is NEVER a Segment property — it's opaque tenant-scoped taxonomy that could leak the tenant's programming.
season_id (ULID sea_*) is anonymised — safe to send.

Financial + audit-critical events (Season Current Changed, Season Dates Shifted, Season Sport Key Changed) use consent_required=essential because they feed compliance dashboards that operate independently of tenant consent.
